steps.title: Find the median of the given list
steps.content:
With 7 values (odd count), the median is the middle value—the 4th element when sorted.
Given: 12, 22, 24, 33, 39, 42, 44
Median = 33

steps.title: Identify which choice has the same median
steps.content:
Each answer choice has 7 values, so the median is again the 4th element:
  • Choice A: 22, 25, 35, 38, 49, 50, 54
  • Choice B: 22, 28, 33, 39, 41, 43, 46
  • Choice C: 12, 15, 28, 33, 35, 39, 39
  • Choice D: 22, 25, 26, 28, 33, 33, 39
Only Choice C has 33 in the 4th position, matching the original median. That matches choice C — C is correct.
